name: Caller asks a coverage question mid-intake (policy-question interrupt)
notes: Triggers int_policy_question: the caller asks about rental coverage during intake. The agent answers generically from the FAQ, defers per-policy specifics and any premium impact to the adjuster, then returns to the claim. NOTE: retrieve_on_turn (cap_lookup_coverage) is a runtime behavior — it fires under a native runner, not under this prompt-target harness, so the answer here comes from the FAQ alone.
user_turns: Casey Lin, policy three oh nine eight eight one two.
Yes. Quick question before we go on — will my insurance cover a rental while the car's in the shop?
Got it. And will this make my premium go up?
Okay, let's keep going with the claim.
